Off Calendar Dec-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Todd M. Moreno and Daniel T. Fitzpatrick (415)294-0865 for DEFENDANT HERBERT ALSTON the moving party/ Attorney Anthony Harris (415)279-8677 for Marsha Pendergrass the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT HERBERT ALSTON's Amended Notice Of Motion To Quash, the Court's tentative Ruling Stands as follows: DENIED. Defendant was properly served pursuant to CCP 415.20(b). Plaintiff's request for sanctions is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
